must_detect.matched_text:
Solwon Advanced Components Ltd. — Data Transfer and Retention Note (KR)
This note summarises privacy controls for a Korean issuer subject to PIPA and FSCMA.
Controller: Solwon Advanced Components Ltd. (Seoul Venture Exchange issuer code: SVX-0000, placeholder only).
Regulatory context: Financial Oversight Council (FOC‑KR) circulars on MNPI handling and PIPA consent standards; IR notices follow SVE disclosure rules.
PII scope includes employee and investor contact data; resident-number fields appear only as masked placeholders (e.g., RRN: 000000-0000000 invalid) and are not stored in IR systems.
Minimisation: onboarding forms collect role, business email, and payroll bank alias only; RRN capture is disabled unless payroll onboarding via HR portal.
Retention: IR inquiry logs retained 3 years then archived to a hash-only index; employment records follow statutory schedules; no retention expiry falls this month.
Consent management: withdrawal can be submitted via privacy.solwoncomponents.example.kr; as of this memo no withdrawal requests are pending.
DSAR: requests are received only at privacy@solwoncomponents.example.kr; none are outstanding, and identity verification uses tokenised HR keys, not resident-numbers.
Erasure: routine deletions ran in March and completed with no exceptions; no emergency purge is scheduled.
Cross-border transfer: On 2025-04-02, approval was granted for export of employee contact metadata to NamuCloud Pte. (SG) as processor under PIPA Art. 28-7; KR SCCs and a processor DPA Schedule A were executed.
No further transfers are planned this quarter, and there is no live deal-related sharing of MNPI; public IR slides cite only already-announced, stale figures.
FSCMA compliance: insider lists are maintained internally; no investor-relations staff have trading accounts at Pinegate Securities Advisory KR Branch (fictional) per poli
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_not_detect.reason: role noun/defined term, not a person or identifier
